author: lOrm
content: Issue calls for CronCreate recurring/durable flags, 50-job cap enforcement, and next-fire-date validation. Not addressable in a cleanup pass: requires extending the cron tool schema, durable-job persistence (already exists for crons), and validation before commit. The 50-job cap and next-fire validation are quick but flag-schema design has CC-parity dependencies. Parent audit #523.
